sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45067" key="eu)rw/ghs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐρώγης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥώξ</etym>) <sense id="n45067.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of fine grapes</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πεντάς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.190</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gaet.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
